notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-Q MD&A part 1 of 2 (source_id 0001546417-24-000125, 2024-08-07); names coined only from this visible part.
No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (present only on chunk_001), so all candidates are event-text grounded.
All evidence_quote values verified as exact substrings of the event content.

Skipped as vague/mechanical (12): bare inflation (captured via commodity_inflation/wage_inflation), operating weeks table metric, gift card breakage definition, interest expense table line (no narrative attribution), franchise royalties definition, cybersecurity boilerplate, leverage/restrictive covenants boilerplate, adverse weather boilerplate, social-media brand reputation, sustainability reporting requirements, laws/regulations/litigation boilerplate, consumer tastes and dietary habits bundle.
Brand-level comps coined per ontology R9 (brand metric = own driver): outback_steakhouse_same_store_sales and brazil_same_store_sales alongside company-wide same_store_sales.
restaurant_development used instead of banned 'opening' wording for new-unit expansion; quote is the source's own phrase 'restaurant development and technology projects'.
